---
title: "Backcountry Ski Tours"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    highlight: tango
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(pacman)
pacman::p_load( gsheet, knitr,raster,leaflet,rsconnect,datasets, dplyr, xlsx, maptools,
                rgdal, ggplot2, devtools, ggthemes, gtools, scales, DT, RColorBrewer, Rserve)

setwd("X:/Trans/STAFF/Reid/viz/rhaefer.github.io/ski tours")
shapefile <- readOGR(dsn=".", layer="tours_ski_leaflet",verbose = FALSE)
shapefile<-spTransform(shapefile, CRS("+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84"))

data<-read.xlsx("Ski_Tours.xlsx", header=T, sheetName = "sheet1")

leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles("Stamen.Terrain", group = "Toner Lite") %>%
  addPolylines(data=shapefile, weight=4, color="red",
               popup=paste(sep="<br/>",paste("<b>Tour Name:</b> ",shapefile$name),
                           paste("<b>Date:</b> ",shapefile$Ski.Tours),
                           paste("<b>Location:</b> ",shapefile$Ski.Tour_1),
                           paste("<b>Objective Achieved:</b> ",shapefile$Ski.Tour_4),
                           paste("<b>Avalanche Forecast:</b> ",shapefile$Ski.Tour_5))) %>%
  addMiniMap(toggleDisplay = TRUE) %>%
  addEasyButton(easyButton(icon="fa-globe", title="Zoom to Level 1", onClick=JS("function(btn, map){ map.setZoom(4); }"))) %>%
  addLegend("topright", title= "Backcountry Ski Tours", colors= "#c60905", labels= "ski tour")
```
______________________________________________________________________________________________
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

data_table<-data %>% select(date, general.area, tour.name, objective.achieved, nwac.avy.rating, weather, duration) 
colnames(data_table)<-c("Date", "Area", "Objective", "Objective Achieved", "NWAC Forecast", "Weather", "Duration")
data_table$Date <- format(as.Date(data_table$Date), "%m/%d/%Y")
data_table<-data_table[order(as.Date(data_table$Date, format="%m/%d/%Y")),]
kable(data_table, caption = "Recent Ski Tours", row.names=FALSE, align='l')
```
